label: HiBob
description: Connect to HiBob to sync employee records, org data, and HR workflows from your modern HRIS.

form.title: Connect HiBob
form.subtitle: Paste a HiBob service user token to give Anton read access to your people data.

methods.label: Service user token
methods.description: Generate a dedicated service user in HiBob and paste its token here. No OAuth flow required — just copy and paste from Settings → Integrations → Service users.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a HiBob service user token

HiBob uses service users — bot-like accounts with their own API tokens — for integrations.

### Steps

1. Log in to HiBob as an admin.
2. Go to **Settings** (gear icon, top-right) → **Integrations** → **Service users**.
3. Click **+ New service user**.
4. Give it a name like `Anton` and assign the appropriate read permissions for the data you want Anton to access (e.g. People, Payroll, Time off).
5. Click **Generate token**. HiBob shows the token **once** — copy it immediately.
6. Paste the token into the **Service user token** field below.
7. Enter your HiBob company ID (visible in your HiBob URL: `app.hibob.com/company/<company-id>`).

### Notes

- The token is shown only once. If you lose it, delete the service user and create a new one.
- Scope permissions narrowly — grant only the modules Anton needs to access.
- Tokens do not expire by default but can be revoked at any time from the Service users page.

fields.name: service_user_id
fields.label: Service user ID
fields.description: The service user's ID or email shown in Settings → Integrations → Service users.

fields.name: service_user_token
fields.label: Service user token
fields.placeholder: Paste your HiBob service user token
fields.description: Generated once when you create the service user. If lost, generate a new token from the Service users page.

fields.name: company_id
fields.label: Company ID
fields.description: Optional. Found in your HiBob URL: app.hibob.com/company/<company-id>. Used to scope API requests correctly.
